{{Infobox location
| name = Bel Calem
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

''See also: [[Bel Calem Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Bel Calem is a city that serves as the seat of power for the [[Overlord]]. It features diverse architecture, ranging from pale brick housing to a central district constructed from rare stones, precious metals, and imported woods. The city is protected by stone walls that stand approximately twelve feet high, though these walls are not wide enough for sentries to walk upon. Within the city, one can find large halls supported by ancient-looking stone columns and arches, as well as well-appointed offices containing extensive libraries. The city is also home to various guardians and can be reached via [[Naraka]], a route characterized by heavy defenses and difficult terrain. Historically, Bel Calem has been a site of significant conflict and destruction. It was devastated by the [[Naraka Incarnation]], which burned large portions of the city and caused massive damage. During such periods of chaos, the streets have been occupied by monsters like ash hounds and akna’dorma. The city has also been a location for significant combat involving [[Travelers]] and gold-armored warriors.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Bel Calem is a city characterized by stone walls standing roughly twelve feet high and houses constructed from wood, stone, pale brick, or precious metals. Serving as the seat of the [[Overlord]], this location is the place of origin for [[Leah]], who eventually commands [[Yakir]] to take her back there for a stay lasting several weeks. The city is also noted by [[Cormac]] and serves as a destination that [[Alin]] wishes to reach. Currently, the [[Myrians]] are traveling toward Bel Calem.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is the place [[Leah]] came from.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2">''House of Blades'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a location [[Leah]] commands [[Yakir]] to take her to.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is the [[Overlord]]'s seat.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c3">''House of Blades'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a location mentioned by [[Cormac]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c4">''House of Blades'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Leah]] spent a few weeks in [[Bel Calem]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Myrians]] are headed for [[Bel Calem]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16">''House of Blades'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a destination [[Alin]] wishes to reach.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a city with stone walls approximately twelve feet tall.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17">''House of Blades'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a city.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Bel Calem]] is a city where the houses are made of pale brick, wood, stone, or precious metals.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Bel Calem serves as the home of [[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus and can be reached by traveling through [[Naraka]]. The location is situated a four day's journey from [[Enosh]] via land routes. During his travels, [[Kai]] conducted business within the area. Additionally, it is a place where ash resulting from the destruction of the [[Incarnation]] could be scattered.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Bel Calem]] is the home of [[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Bel Calem]] is a location reachable through [[Naraka]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Kai]] had business in [[Bel Calem]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Bel Calem]] is a four day's journey from [[Enosh]] over land.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Ash from the [[Incarnation]]'s destruction could be scattered to [[Bel Calem]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Bel Calem]] was torn to pieces by the [[Naraka Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Bel Calem]] is a location where [[Malachi]] has an office.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c5">''City of Light'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Bel Calem]] is a kingdom/place comparable to [[Myria]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c16">''City of Light'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|“You will take me to Bel Calem,” Leah commanded.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c2" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
